title: Rocket Lab Stock Heads For Best Month Of 2026: Retail Bulls Energized By Hints Of Central Role In America's Space Defense Push
text: Rocket Lab stock is on track for its best month of 2026 as investors bet on the space company after it hinted at a key role in America's rapidly growing defense market, with shares surging 60% so far this month. During its recent earnings call, CEO Peter Beck said the space firm was already supporting missile warning, missile tracking, hypersonic testing and Space-Based Interceptor programs. Retail investors are extremely bullish on RKLB, driven by strong operational execution, government contracts, and exposure to the U.S. space defense initiative. The U.S. Space Force Chief of Space Operations General Chance Saltzman recently visited the company, which boosted investor confidence. Trump bought $15,001-$50,000 worth of RKLB shares, adding to the bullish narrative.
